tasks.Description: Review the software high-level requirements to ensure they are complete and clear.

tasks.Name: Identify Architectural Components
tasks.Description: Identify the architectural components needed to meet the software high-level requirements.

tasks.Name: Define Software Architecture
tasks.Description: Define the software architecture by organizing the identified components and their interactions.

tasks.Name: Review System Requirements for Allocation
tasks.Description: Review system requirements to identify allocation criteria for subsystems.

tasks.Name: Identify Subsystem Allocation Options
tasks.Description: Identify potential subsystems for each system requirement based on allocation criteria.

tasks.Name: Select Subsystem Allocations
tasks.Description: Select the most appropriate subsystem for each system requirement based on analysis.

tasks.Name: Document Subsystem Requirements
tasks.Description: Compile the selected subsystem allocations into the Subsystem Requirements Specification.

tasks.Name: Review System Verification Plan
tasks.Description: Examine the system verification plan to ensure it aligns with system requirements.

tasks.Name: Identify Verification Procedures
tasks.Description: Determine specific procedures needed to verify each system requirement.

tasks.Name: Develop Verification Procedures
tasks.Description: Create detailed procedures for each identified verification method.

tasks.Name: Prepare Verification Environment
tasks.Description: Set up the necessary environment and tools for system verification.

tasks.Name: Execute Verification Procedures
tasks.Description: Perform the verification procedures as per the developed plan.

tasks.Name: Analyze Verification Results
tasks.Description: Analyze the results obtained from executing the verification procedures.

tasks.Name: Document Verification Findings
tasks.Description: Compile and document the findings from the verification analysis.

tasks.Name: Check Document Completeness
tasks.Description: Verify that the Interface Control Document contains all necessary sections and information.

tasks.Name: Check Document Accuracy
tasks.Description: Ensure the accuracy of the data and information presented in the Interface Control Document.

tasks.Name: Extract Function Candidates
tasks.Description: Extract potential function candidates from the reviewed operational requirements.

tasks.Name: Validate Function Candidates
tasks.Description: Validate the extracted function candidates against operational requirements.

tasks.Name: Review Identified Functions
tasks.Description: Review the identified aircraft functions to ensure completeness and accuracy.

tasks.Name: Document Preliminary Function List
tasks.Description: Document the reviewed functions into a preliminary list for further analysis.

tasks.Name: Check Function Allocation Completeness
tasks.Description: Ensure that all aircraft functions have been allocated to systems.

tasks.Name: Verify Function Allocation Accuracy
tasks.Description: Verify that the allocated functions accurately reflect system capabilities.

tasks.Name: Review Function List
tasks.Description: Examine the reviewed function list to identify potential top-level functions.

tasks.Name: Select Top-Level Functions
tasks.Description: Select and document the top-level functions from the reviewed list.

tasks.Name: Review Top-Level Functions
tasks.Description: Examine the top-level functions to ensure they are correctly identified and documented.

tasks.Name: Decompose Functions
tasks.Description: Break down top-level functions into detailed sub-functions.

tasks.Name: Document Decomposed Functions
tasks.Description: Record the detailed sub-functions in the functional decomposition document.

tasks.Name: Review Function List
tasks.Description: Examine the aircraft function list to ensure it includes all necessary functions.

tasks.Name: Validate Function Compliance
tasks.Description: Check that each function meets operational and regulatory requirements.

tasks.Name: Review Aircraft Functions
tasks.Description: Examine the reviewed aircraft functions to understand their scope and context.

tasks.Name: Extract Functional Requirements
tasks.Description: Derive functional requirements based on the reviewed aircraft functions and applicable regulations.

tasks.Name: Review Identified Functional Requirements
tasks.Description: Review the identified functional requirements to ensure completeness and accuracy.

tasks.Name: Compile Functional Requirements Document
tasks.Description: Compile the reviewed functional requirements into a formal document.

tasks.Name: Review Aircraft Functions
tasks.Description: Examine the aircraft function list to understand interface needs.

tasks.Name: Review Applicable Regulations
tasks.Description: Analyze applicable regulations to determine interface requirements.

tasks.Name: Review Interface Context
tasks.Description: Examine the reviewed interface context to understand the scope and constraints.

tasks.Name: Analyze Interface Needs
tasks.Description: Determine specific interface requirements based on the reviewed context.

tasks.Name: Format Interface Requirements
tasks.Description: Format the identified interface requirements into a structured template.

tasks.Name: Review Formatted Requirements
tasks.Description: Review the formatted interface requirements for completeness and accuracy.

tasks.Name: Compile Functional Derived Requirements
tasks.Description: Compile derived requirements specifically from the functional category.

tasks.Name: Compile Performance Derived Requirements
tasks.Description: Compile derived requirements specifically from the performance category.

tasks.Name: Compile Safety Derived Requirements
tasks.Description: Compile derived requirements specifically from the safety category.

tasks.Name: Compile Interface Derived Requirements
tasks.Description: Compile derived requirements specifically from the interface category.

tasks.Name: Review Compiled Derived Requirements
tasks.Description: Review the compiled derived requirements to ensure completeness and accuracy.

tasks.Name: Format System Requirements Specification
tasks.Description: Format the reviewed derived requirements into the System Requirements Specification document.

tasks.Name: Review System Requirements Specification
tasks.Description: Examine the System Requirements Specification for completeness and correctness.

tasks.Name: Identify Architectural Needs
tasks.Description: Determine the architectural needs based on the reviewed system requirements.

tasks.Name: Compile Reviewed System Requirements
tasks.Description: Compile the findings from the review into a formal document.

tasks.Name: Review System Requirements
tasks.Description: Review the system requirements to understand the architectural implications.

tasks.Name: Identify Architectural Components
tasks.Description: Identify necessary architectural components based on the reviewed system requirements.

tasks.Name: Review System Requirements for Constraints
tasks.Description: Examine the system requirements to identify potential architectural constraints.

tasks.Name: Document Architectural Constraints
tasks.Description: Compile and document the identified architectural constraints.

tasks.Name: Analyze Architectural Needs and Constraints
tasks.Description: Analyze the reviewed architectural needs and constraints to inform concept development.

tasks.Name: Generate Initial Hardware Architecture Concepts
tasks.Description: Generate initial hardware architecture concepts based on analyzed needs and constraints.

tasks.Name: Assess Feasibility of Hardware Architecture Concepts
tasks.Description: Analyze the hardware architecture concepts to determine their feasibility in meeting system requirements.

tasks.Name: Verify Compliance of Hardware Architecture Concepts
tasks.Description: Evaluate the hardware architecture concepts for compliance with applicable standards and regulations.

tasks.Name: Review Evaluated Hardware Architecture Concepts
tasks.Description: Review the evaluated hardware architecture concepts to ensure they meet the necessary criteria.

tasks.Name: Select Optimal Hardware Architecture
tasks.Description: Select the optimal hardware architecture from the reviewed concepts based on evaluation results.

tasks.Name: Format Hardware Architecture Document
tasks.Description: Format the selected hardware architecture into a structured document.

tasks.Name: Review Hardware Architecture Document
tasks.Description: Review the formatted hardware architecture document for accuracy and completeness.

tasks.Name: Examine System Requirements
tasks.Description: Examine the System Requirements Specification to identify key verification aspects.

tasks.Name: Identify Verification Needs
tasks.Description: Identify the verification needs based on the examined system requirements.

tasks.Name: Compile Reviewed System Requirements
tasks.Description: Compile the reviewed system requirements into a formal document.

tasks.Name: Review System Requirements for Verification
tasks.Description: Review the system requirements to understand the context and scope of verification needs.

tasks.Name: Determine Specific Verification Needs
tasks.Description: Identify specific verification needs based on the reviewed system requirements.

tasks.Name: Gather Verification Objectives
tasks.Description: Collect verification objectives from the provided source document.

tasks.Name: Organize Verification Objectives
tasks.Description: Arrange the gathered verification objectives into a structured format.

tasks.Name: Gather Verification Methods
tasks.Description: Collect all relevant verification methods from the provided artifact.

tasks.Name: Organize Verification Methods
tasks.Description: Structure the gathered verification methods for inclusion in the System Verification Plan.

tasks.Name: Gather Test Strategies
tasks.Description: Collect all relevant test strategies from various sources.

tasks.Name: Organize Test Strategies
tasks.Description: Arrange the gathered test strategies into a structured format.

tasks.Name: Integrate Verification Objectives
tasks.Description: Integrate compiled verification objectives into the System Verification Plan.

tasks.Name: Integrate Verification Methods
tasks.Description: Integrate compiled verification methods into the System Verification Plan.

tasks.Name: Integrate Test Strategies
tasks.Description: Integrate compiled test strategies into the System Verification Plan.

tasks.Name: Compile Final System Verification Plan
tasks.Description: Compile the integrated components into the final System Verification Plan.

tasks.Name: Review System Architecture Document
tasks.Description: Examine the System Architecture Description for completeness and accuracy.

tasks.Name: Identify Integration Needs
tasks.Description: Determine the integration needs based on the reviewed System Architecture Description.

tasks.Name: Review System Architecture for Interface Points
tasks.Description: Examine the system architecture to identify potential interface points required for integration.

tasks.Name: Review Interface Points
tasks.Description: Review the identified interface points to understand their context and relevance.

tasks.Name: Determine Interface Requirements
tasks.Description: Determine specific requirements for each interface point based on system needs.

tasks.Name: Document Interface Requirements
tasks.Description: Document the determined interface requirements in a structured format.

tasks.Name: Review Analyzed Interface Requirements
tasks.Description: Review the analyzed interface requirements to ensure completeness and accuracy.

tasks.Name: Organize Interface Requirements
tasks.Description: Organize the reviewed interface requirements into a structured format.

tasks.Name: Compile System Interface List
tasks.Description: Compile the organized interface requirements into a comprehensive list of system interfaces.

tasks.Name: Check Interface Completeness
tasks.Description: Ensure all necessary system interfaces are identified and documented.

tasks.Name: Verify Interface Accuracy
tasks.Description: Confirm the accuracy of the identified system interfaces against system requirements.

tasks.Name: Gather Reviewed System Interfaces
tasks.Description: Collect all reviewed system interfaces for inclusion in the Interface Control Document.

tasks.Name: Format Interface Control Document
tasks.Description: Format the gathered interfaces into the Interface Control Document structure.

tasks.Name: Review Preliminary Function List
tasks.Description: Examine the preliminary aircraft function list to ensure completeness and accuracy.

tasks.Name: Understand Function Context
tasks.Description: Analyze the reviewed function list to understand the context for function allocation.
